top_signals.title: Stocks Waver as US-Iran Risks Offset Tech Rebound: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A renewed bout of oil volatility sent stocks wavering, with concerns about further escalation in Middle East hostilities tempering gains in technology firms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TIACA taps airport exec Mammen Tharakan to lead air cargo group
top_signals.summary:
Mammen Tharakan is leaving his job helping to develop a second airport in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, to become head of The International Air Cargo Association.

The post TIACA taps airport exec Mammen Tharakan to lead air cargo group appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The U.S. Needs 5000 Miles of New High-Voltage Lines Annually. It Only Built 392
top_signals.summary: There is an old Yiddish expression that translates literally as “stop beating the teapot” which we would freely translate as, “We’ve heard this before, so why don’t you just stop?” Well, as new numbers come out and our great leaders keep coming up with new solutions to whatever they think ails the energy sector, we just can’t resist. So here they are, the latest yearly average of miles of high-voltage transmission added to the grid since 2010: Transmission lines of under 345KV are largely used for local…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
